articles.title: Everett moves to rein in data centers as pushback grows across Massachusetts
articles.description:
A new zoning proposal would limit projects in a key redevelopment district, reflecting rising concern over the industry’s footprint statewide.

The post Everett moves to rein in data centers as pushback grows across Massachusetts appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Everett proposes zoning changes to limit data center developments in redevelopment districts.
Concerns about environmental impact and energy consumption are rising across Massachusetts.
Local residents may see reduced industrial expansion and improved community planning.

articles.title: South Shore med spa owner pleads guilty to administering thousands of fake Botox and other treatments
articles.description:
Rebecca Fadanelli, who was not licensed to perform injections, received more than $1 million in client payments, authorities say.

The post South Shore med spa owner pleads guilty to administering thousands of fake Botox and other treatments appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Rebecca Fadanelli pleaded guilty to administering fake Botox treatments at her South Shore med spa.
She received over $1 million from clients despite lacking a license for injections.
Boston residents may face health risks from unregulated cosmetic procedures in the area.

articles.title: What Joe Mazzulla said about praise from Giannis Antetokounmpo
articles.description:
"He's a great player, but I think my reaction is that you can't do anything unless you have the players to be able to do it."

The post What Joe Mazzulla said about praise from Giannis Antetokounmpo appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Joe Mazzulla acknowledged Giannis Antetokounmpo's praise for his coaching abilities.
Mazzulla emphasized the importance of having talented players to succeed in the NBA.
This recognition may boost morale for Boston Celtics fans ahead of the playoffs.
